details: The package contains lib/trap-core.js, which combines os/fs/https/child_process imports with multiple POST request bodies that include hostname fields built from os.hostname() and os.platform(). The file references shell-command primitives (including ping) and packages host-identifying data into HTTPS POST bodies — the structural shape of a host fingerprinting and exfiltration module. The file name ("trap-core") and its presence inside a package advertised as an "LLM context compressor" are inconsistent with the declared purpose: a text-compression library has no need to enumerate the host, spawn child processes, or POST system identifiers over HTTPS. Installing or requiring this package exposes the host running the install/build to system-information collection.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
